sourceScopeConflicts.quote: The Pharmacy Student Summer Externship Program at Houston Methodist Hospital is a six-week, non-compensated, hands-on experience designed to provide an introduction to hospital-based pharmacy for students enrolled in a Doctor of Pharmacy program who have completed their first or second year.
sourceScopeConflicts.claimText: URL hint suggested OBSERVERSHIP but page content is a Doctor of Pharmacy student externship, not a medical observership. Source family mismatch.
sourceScopeConflicts.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is a pharmacy (PharmD) student externship, outside the three physician-pipeline tiers; not USCE-relevant for medical students or IMGs.
sourceScopeConflicts.limitations: Pharmacy externship audience (P1/P2 PharmD), not medical students; URL path /observership is misleading.

sourceScopeConflicts.quote: The primary objective for this program is to provide P1 and P2 students with the opportunity to understand and experience the various aspects of institutional pharmacy.
sourceScopeConflicts.claimText: Program is restricted to P1 and P2 (first and second year) Doctor of Pharmacy students — not medical students or IMGs.
sourceScopeConflicts.tierAssignmentRationale: Audience is PharmD students, not within physician pipeline tiers tracked by USCEHub.

sourceScopeConflicts.claimText: Externship dates: June 1 - July 10, 2026 (approximately six weeks).
sourceScopeConflicts.tierAssignmentRationale: Duration belongs to a PharmD externship, not a physician-pipeline USCE program.

sourceScopeConflicts.quote: Submit the following via email to Kathryn N. Pidcock, PharmD, BCPS at knpidcock@houstonmethodist.org

sourceScopeConflicts.tierAssignmentRationale: Coordinator contact for PharmD externship; not a physician-tier USCE coordinator.

sourceScopeConflicts.quote: The Pharmacy Student Summer Externship Program at Houston Methodist Hospital is a six-week, non-compensated, hands-on experience
